info.name: School Management API
info.description: Postman collection for adding schools and listing them by proximity.

request.description:
Creates a new school after validating the payload.

Expected success response: 201 Created
Expected error response: 400 Bad Request when any field is missing or invalid.

Returns all schools sorted from nearest to farthest based on the user's latitude and longitude.

Expected success response: 200 OK
Expected error response: 400 Bad Request when query parameters are invalid.
